free_text: Elastic and inelastic scattering of 3.4 MeV neutrons
Complete set of final numerical data
Each of the following references covers only part of
the nuclei, data are given often in graphical form
only or are preliminary values (note by NDS)
Pulsed deuteron beam on D-loaded Ti-target
Time-of-flight with an overall resolution of 3 ns
Absolute measurement by measurement of the protons
OS. Minor corrections and acc.no. assigned
by NDS before transmission to other centres.
